blended.narrative: Lakeridge is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,760 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 5" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
